calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. YVONNE BROWNING, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Browning Law Group, APC (tel: 949-234-6266) for Plaintiff.
Defendant Mimi Wong, pro per present in Court (tel: 415-508-8092).

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court grants judgment debtor's claim of exemption.

Order signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steve Mains, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo National Association.
No appearance by defendant Mimi Wong, individually and dba John's Cafe.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on December 1, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 1, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, February 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo National Association, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mimi Wong, individually and dba John's Cafe, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,027.29.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,194.35.
Attorney's Fees - $1,274.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $51,930.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Continued To Mar-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
